dod_met: P1 fixed: production pipeline.run_pipeline and silver.run.run_news now instantiate configurable FileSystemCache and pass it to extract_batch
P1 regression added: production paths run twice with mocked generate_json and second run uses cache hits with zero new LLM calls
P2 fixed: _normalize_article preserves known GDELT/GKG/tone/source metadata for passthrough selection
P2 regression added: GDELT/GKG fixture persists a passthrough NewsFeature while generate_json is patched to fail
P3 fixed: gkg_tone is selected by key presence so 0 is preserved as neutral
P3 regression added: gkg_tone=0 beats fallback tone and produces neutral sentiment
Full pytest suite run once after fixes: 187 passed, 3 skipped
Coursework progress logs and research note updated
